introSection: Crazy Mouse is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer L&T Systems currently located at Gulliver's Land in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, UK.
fullText:
Crazy Mouse is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer L&T Systems currently located at Gulliver's Land in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, UK.



Black track and unpainted supports.
